nasb.text: Woe is me! For I am Like the fruit pickers, like the grape gatherers. There is not a cluster of grapes to eat, Or a first-ripe fig which I crave.

esv.text: Woe is me! For I have become as when the summer fruit has been gathered, as when the grapes have been gleaned: there is no cluster to eat, no first-ripe fig that my soul desires.

cnv.text: 我有禍了！ 因為我好像夏天採摘的果子，又像摘剩的葡萄， 沒有一掛可吃的， 也沒有我心所想望早熟的無花果。

ccb.text: 我真悲惨！ 就像夏天的果子已被收尽， 葡萄已被摘净， 找不到一串可吃的， 寻不见我心中渴望的初熟无花果。
